name: Stack

aliases.name: Stack
aliases.comment: The Stack type uses an array to represent the stack.
aliases.type: { data : Array a, top : Int, default : a }

values.name: initialise
values.comment: Initialises a stack given an initialisation value and a stack size.

values.name: pop
values.comment: Removes the item at the top of the stack and returns it as the first item of a tuple.
values.type: Stack (Maybe a) -> ( Maybe a, Stack (Maybe a) )

values.name: push
values.comment: Pushes an item onto the stack and returns the new stack. The item must be of the same type as the stack.
